segments.text: spake unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tabernacle of the congregation, on the first day of the second month, in the second year after they were come out of the land of Egypt, saying,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Take ye the sum of all the congregation of the children of Israel, after their families, by the house of their fathers, with the number of their names, every male by their polls;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: From twenty years old and upward, all that are able to go forth to war in Israel: thou and Aaron shall number them by their armies.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And with you there shall be a man of every tribe; every one head of the house of his fathers.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And these are the names of the men that shall stand with you:
of the tribe of Reuben; Elizur the son of Shedeur.
Of Gad; Eliasaph the son of Deuel.
These were the renowned of the congregation, princes of the tribes of their fathers, heads of thousands in Israel.
And Moses and Aaron took these men which are expressed by their names:
As the LORD commanded Moses, so he numbered them in the wilderness of Sinai.
But the Levites after the tribe of their fathers were not numbered among them.
Only thou shalt not number the tribe of Levi, neither take the sum of them among the children of Israel:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But thou shalt appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of testimony, and over all the vessels thereof, and over all things that belong to it: they shall bear the tabernacle, and all the vessels thereof; and they shall minister unto it, and shall encamp round about the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And the children of Israel did according to all that the LORD commanded Moses, so did they.
